name: tagvinzant-skills
description: Tag Vinzant's custom Claude Code skills

plugins.name: scrapling
plugins.description: Web scraping, website cloning, and content extraction with the Scrapling library

plugins.name: payload
plugins.description: Payload CMS: collections, fields, hooks, access control, queries, database adapters, and Railway deployment

plugins.name: railway
plugins.description: Use when running Railway CLI commands, deploying to Railway, managing Railway services/volumes/variables/domains, or troubleshooting Railway deployments. Triggers on: railway, railway CLI, deploy to Railway, railway volume, railway variables, railway ssh, railway logs, railway domain.
